steps.observed: Code review confirms var_vals vector capacity is lag_len only, not n×lag_len

evidence.codeAnalysis: src/rust/src/lib.rs fused_crossbasis function uses `var_vals: Vec<f64> = Vec::with_capacity(lag_len)` per row iteration, not full (n × lag_range) matrix. Dot products computed incrementally via flat_map_iter without materializing lag matrices.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-P1-006 verified group boundary handling at 23 city boundaries. VAL-P1-007 confirmed memory efficiency via gc() measurements and code analysis (fused sliding-window approach). VAL-P1-008 verified NA propagation matches R exactly (9715 NAs from 100 injected). VAL-P1-009 confirmed single-group correctness within tolerance 1e-10.
